name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
After tonight's debate | Friend --

I don't know how else to say it except by saying it: We could lose the nomination.

The other candidates on that stage tonight would like nothing more than for our team to sit back and relax right now, but I am not taking anything for granted.

You can't either, I need your help.

**Let's show the world that we 're going to fight hard, secure the Democratic nomination, and go on to the White House. I know you'll step up when I need you. Chip in $1 today:** | [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Thanks,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQyODgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMDY1NjQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Nope, they won't
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
During the debate tonight, I was asked if corporations would like President Sanders. I think it's safe to say they won't. Wall Street will like me even less.
That's because our country has a rigged economy held in place by a corrupt system of campaign finance, and we must put an end to that.
**I can't take on the billionaire class alone. I need you to stand with me tonight. So I am asking you directly:**
[**Make a $3 contribution to our political revolution that will win the Democratic nomination, the White House, and take back our country from the billionaire class.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29d0/43f17890/4a940629/6210bda0/1007421931/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democratic-debate?refcode=em151219nd")
I'm running for president because the middle class is disappearing and more than half of new income is going to the top 1 percent.
I'm running for president because it is harder than ever for students to pay for college and for working parents to afford daycare.
I'm running for president because a handful of billionaires and wealthy families are trying to buy elections just to make themselves richer.
**We can't rely on the political establishment to do the work for us. We can't rely on the corporate-owned media to get out our message about it. We need a political revolution to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, and we need to build that ourselves.**
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign to send a message to Wall Street and the rest of the billionaire class that you want to see a President Sanders.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29d0/43f17890/4a940629/6210bda0/1007421931/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democratic-debate?refcode=em151219nd")
We are doing something unprecedented, and that has a lot of people scared. I am glad to have you on our side.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29d0/43f17890/4a940629/6210bda0/1007421931/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/democratic-debate?refcode=em151219nd")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29d0/43f17890/4a940629/6210b34d/1007421931/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29d0/43f17890/4a940629/6210b34a/1007421931/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29d0/43f17890/4a940629/6210b34b/1007421931/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29d0/43f17890/4a940629/6210b348/1007421931/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Ben Carson
subject: Sound the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388133:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r)
---

Peter,

I have been working tirelessly to spread my message that the time is now for "We The People" to take our country back.

The message is spreading fast but please know the Power Class is fighting back.

**You need no further proof than what the GOP leadership did to us in the new government spending bill.**

Billions of new unfunded spending. Mountains of new debt. Not to mention funding to bring Syrian refugees into our country and to keep funding for Planned Parenthood.

I am angry but no longer shocked.

Some of my colleagues running for President talk a big game. They give angry speeches but when the votes were counted none of them even tried to stop this deal. They take their special interest money, collect their paychecks and pensions and give us only rhetoric.

Yes, it makes me angry.

**The powerful will continue to stomp on the powerless until we rise up together.**

[**You can help right now by making a donation to my campaign of any amount.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388133:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r)
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388133:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r)
---
Our country has only years left before we drown in our own pool of debt. Debt incurred by the powerful to be paid by the powerless.

No member of Congress should dare ask for a pension let alone receive one until the debts of their irresponsibility have been paid.

Our grandchildren will be left with these outrageous bills.

Someday when your grandchildren ask you why America failed, you can point to this week.

You can tell them it was because our leaders were afraid to do what was right because it was difficult.

**We have but one last best chance. I promise to work even harder.**

But without joining hands it simply cannot be done. We must all do things we have never done before.

Think of our ancestors. Those brave men and women who fought for our country across oceans to keep us free. Many gave their all. But all gave more than they thought possible.

Now it is our turn. This is our time, our battle. Our country's future rests on our determination and dedication. History will judge us.

[**I ask you to stand tall with me right now by making a secure donation of any amount.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388133:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r)

It's time to sound the alarm!

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388133:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388134:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388135:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388136:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388137:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32388138:WNtzgiyNc:m:1:876315805:44C2BE2F66C6F7E744949EAAAECC38D3:r)
---|---|---|---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I'm very concerned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend, have I done something wrong? With only a few days left before 2015 comes to an end, |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388765:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r) |
---|---|---
---
| **Friend, have I done something wrong?**

With only a few days left before 2015 comes to an end, my campaign has identified 134,835 supporters who have yet to step up and make a critical 2015 contribution.

My finance director just passed the list to me, and your name was at the top.

Is there anything I have done that's kept you from making a recent contribution?

You see...today, your support is more critical than ever.

[**Even $5 would be a big help -- but $25 would give me a bigger boost -- but your donation of any amount you can afford will make me incredibly grateful.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388765:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r)

Without your support -- my campaign will fall dangerously behind -- and nothing would make Hillary Clinton and the Washington Cartel happier than for you to ignore this email.

Take a look at your status below:

| | **Email:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388765:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r)
**Suggested Donation:** $5.00
**Supporter ID:** 162820
**Status:** [**PENDING**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388765:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r)

---|---
Friend, I know you love America as much as I do, and that, like me, you want to see Barack Obama's "reign of error" in the White House end.

I will defeat Hillary Clinton and reverse the errors of Barack Obama's presidency. **BUT this will only be possible if I can count on your continued financial support.**

Please make a 2015 contribution right now to ensure that I do not fall behind.

I'm counting on you:

[** Donate $5 now >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388766:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r)

[** Donate $25 now >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388767:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r)

[** Donate $50 now >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388768:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r)

[** Or donate another amount >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388769:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r)

Thank you for your support.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. If your name is on the list by mistake, please disregard. [**If not -- I hope you will take a moment and make a critical contribution right away.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32388765:skl_8WyNz:m:1:1104269936:1548EEF5E0A425F08C1A998BE8B0D14B:r)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Where does Ted Cruz stand?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-

One thing I think is clear: we can't afford
to hang our hopes for the next election on reality show
entertainers.

Or with a group of neocons.

We need a true champion of liberty and
conservative causes.

That's why I am running and asking for your
help today.

It's also why I am determined that people see
the truth about my opponents.

One of them, Ted Cruz, has worked with me on
some issues, but has some troubling tendencies that need to be
discussed.

Ted Cruz tries to have it both ways and has
flip flopped on number of serious issues. My latest ad addresses
these inconsistencies.

Ted Cruz was against the patriot act when he
ran, but voted to reauthorize it in 2015.

WHAT?

He was also for Obamatrade before he was
against it.

Not a good idea.

He was also all for allowing illegal
immigrants to stay in 2013, but now he is vying for the bus
driver position on Donald Trump's deportation express.

You get the idea.

My thing is - if you ask people to trust you,
well, you should be honest with them.

I think Ted is playing games and politics.
And this is serious business.

We should know where people stand.

Please watch the video.

Stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $75 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

Unsubscribe me from this mailing list

Ted Cruz tries to have it both ways and has flip flopped on number of serious issues. My latest ad addresses these inconsistencies. name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: Obamacare is OVER!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45469700:6QtPDgLNW:m:1:1349778030:5E75CD05C2F3DE40CB07A38EB88F6A6F:r)
---
| | | | Peter, wouldn't you love to read that headline? When Marco Rubio becomes our next President, you will.
Most of the Republican candidates in this presidential race have talked about repealing or otherwise ending ObamaCare. **But how many have actually taken a stand and done something?** **Only one. And that is Marco Rubio.** And when Marco wins this race for president, I can assure you it will be game over for this burdensome and destructive law. [_**That is why I'm asking you to be a part of Team Marco right now.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45469701:6QtPDgLNW:m:1:1349778030:5E75CD05C2F3DE40CB07A38EB88F6A6F:r) For far too long, Washington and Big Business have colluded to rig our economy at the expense of everyday Americans. ObamaCare may be the worst example yet. **Marco has fought from Day One to eliminate Obamacare and he will continue that fight when he is President. [_But in order to eliminate Obamacare we must work day and night to ensure Marco is elected._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45469701:6QtPDgLNW:m:1:1349778030:5E75CD05C2F3DE40CB07A38EB88F6A6F:r)** As ObamaCare has crashed and burned over the last few years, the big health insurance companies that spent MILLIONS lobbying to get it passed have suffered large financial losses. Naturally, they have wanted a taxpayer bailout, and the Obama administration has been eager to give it to them. Peter, after ObamaCare was jammed through Congress in the dark of night, **Marco spent the next two years fighting against an insurer bailout provision within this gargantuan law.** _**This success in stopping a bailout this year saved American taxpayers $2.5 BILLION!**_ He's successfully led the fight to **_permanently end_** the possibility of future taxpayer-funded bailouts to insurers. And of course the next step is repealing ObamaCare entirely, and replacing it with consumer-centered reforms that will allow the people to obtain truly affordable health care coverage. This is just the beginning of what a Rubio White House will do. To make this vision a reality we must keep fighting to build on our campaign's upward momentum, to win the Republican nomination and this historic race for the White House. [_**Please JOIN Team Marco today, by following this secure link!**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45469701:6QtPDgLNW:m:1:1349778030:5E75CD05C2F3DE40CB07A38EB88F6A6F:r) I believe the 2016 election is a generational choice. When it comes to health care, we know that Hillary Clinton would simply double down on the failed 20th century ideas that led to ObamaCare. Marco's ideas are very different, designed to give families power over their own health care instead of entrusting it to bureaucrats. I know you agree we need a conservative president in the White House come January 2017, and Marco is the only candidate who can take on the Clinton campaign machine and win. The stakes are high, and every bit of financial help makes a direct difference in our work to win over new supporters. So, if you haven't done so already, [**_please become a member of Team Marco today._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45469701:6QtPDgLNW:m:1:1349778030:5E75CD05C2F3DE40CB07A38EB88F6A6F:r) Thank you, Peter! Sincerely, Terry SullivanCampaign ManagerMarco Rubio for President P.S. **Just weeks remain** until the first caucuses in Iowa on February 1. Then we're off to New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada... and Super Tuesday is on March 1. This means there is truly no time to waste... the work we're doing RIGHT NOW will determine the outcomes in these key early voting states! Our nation's future is on the line, and we need you on Marco's team. [_**Please join Team Marco right now.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45469701:6QtPDgLNW:m:1:1349778030:5E75CD05C2F3DE40CB07A38EB88F6A6F:r) Thank you.
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45469701:6QtPDgLNW:m:1:1349778030:5E75CD05C2F3DE40CB07A38EB88F6A6F:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[
Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
After last night's debate | Friend --

At last night's debate, I did my best to explain what this team stands for: We're fighting to give the middle class a raise, to protect access to health care, and to build an America where all men and women are truly treated as equals, no matter what you look like, where you're from, or who you love.

Our conversation was a stark contrast from the Republican debate a few days ago.

They want to cut taxes for their billionaire friends, repeal the Affordable Care Act, defund Planned Parenthood, and even ban Muslims from entering this country! They want to take us backward, but I know this team won't let them.

**I'm asking you to chip in $1 right now. Take a stand with me for all the good people of this country who are counting on us to win this election:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQyODk5NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTA3ODE5S0&mt=1&rt=0). name: Bill McKibben for Bernie 2016
subject: I know it in my bones
body:
#
Hi Friend,
Last night's Democratic debate was a disappointment for anyone who cares about the future of our planet. After an historic climate summit in Paris, it is unconscionable that the moderators of last night's debate -- as well as the Republican debate -- didn't ask a single question about climate change.
It's too bad, because Bernie's new climate plan is the kind of deep, powerful plan we really need. [**I hope that you 'll sign on to support it.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29dc/43f17890/4a8533ec/62108777/1220214465/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/climate-plan?source=em151220full")
It gets us started fast -- 40% reductions in carbon emissions by 2030 would put the country and the world on a new pathway.
Bernie's plan would create ten million jobs -- and make sure that they're shared with those communities that usually get left out of our economic booms.
But here's what's really important: Bernie's climate plan comes with unique credibility. Because he's worked hard for change when it wasn't popular or easy. I know this because he's a fellow Vermonter who I've watched for decades. And I know it in my bones because, in the early days of the fight against the Keystone Pipeline, he was almost the only person on Capitol Hill who signed on to help with the fight. He was dogged, and sometimes he was grumpy, and he never let up.
That's the spirit we're going to need going forward. As the revelations of the last few weeks have made clear, the biggest and richest of the oil companies, Exxon, knew everything there was to know about climate change decades ago, and yet helped spread the disinformation and deceit that have held back progress for a quarter-century.
To stand up to that kind of power requires backbone and passionate commitment. And it requires a leader who can mobilize a movement.
When we talk about alternative energy, there's solar, and there's wind. And there's Bernie Sanders.
[**Click here to say you support Bernie's bold new climate plan.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29dc/43f17890/4a8533ec/62108777/1220214465/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/climate-plan?source=em151220full")
In solidarity,
Bill McKibben
Author
**[Sign the petition](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29dc/43f17890/4a8533ec/62108777/1220214465/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/climate-plan?source=em151220full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29dc/43f17890/4a8533ec/62108774/1220214465/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29dc/43f17890/4a8533ec/62108775/1220214465/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29dc/43f17890/4a8533ec/62108772/1220214465/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29dc/43f17890/4a8533ec/62108773/1220214465/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: Going...Going...They're almost gone!

body:

Team Katie **** **** ****** ******

name: petition@boldpac.com
subject: sign your name to END gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| **[Join Democrats across the country and call on Congress to officially declare June as _National Gun Violence Awareness Month_ :](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea768/e60883a/7020a0b6/144231db/1758659309/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month?signature\[first_name\]=&signature\[last_name\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zip_code\]=18326")** | ****[ADD YOUR NAME->](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea768/e60883a/7020a0b6/144231db/1758659309/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month?signature\[first_name\]=&signature\[last_name\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zip_code\]=18326")****
---
**Friends, America has a gun problem.**

The facts speak for themselves:
* Nearly a quarter of U.S. teenagers (14-17) have witnessed a shooting. [1]
* An average of 7 children and teenagers are killed by guns -- _every day_. [2]
* In 2007, more pre-school aged children were killed by gun violence than police officers killed in the line of duty. [3]

It's a sad fact that while guns kill almost 90 people every day in America, Congress isn't passing the critical legislation we need to curb the violence.
_In fact, NRA-backed politicians have made it impossible for the federal government to even study the problem of gun violence._

[It's time to launch a national conversation about the effects of gun violence, and that begins by making June _National Gun Violence Awareness Month_ >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea768/e60883a/7020a0b6/144231db/1758659309/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month?signature\[first_name\]=&signature\[last_name\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zip_code\]=18326")

Make no mistake: the fact that Congress is prohibited from studying gun violence is no accident. It's a testament to the power that the NRA holds over our elected officials.

It's clear that something has to be done to break the silence, and that's why this initiative is so important. It will launch a much-needed national conversation promoting awareness of this critical issue.

It will also provide a platform for addressing the effects of gun violence by bringing citizens and community leaders together to make our communities safer.

**We must take steps _immediately_ to combat this worsening epidemic. Sign this important petition today:**

[http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea768/e60883a/7020a0b6/144231db/1758659309/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month?signature\[first_name\]=&signature\[last_name\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zip_code\]=18326")

Thank you,

_BOLD PAC_
* * *
[1] U.S. Department of Justice | October 2009 | Children's Exposure to Violence: A Comprehensive National Study
[2] CDC Web-based Injury Statistics Query and Reporting System | 2009-2013
[3] Children's Defense Fund | September 2010 | Protect Children Not Guns 2010

|

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---

This message was sent to: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea768/e60883a/7020a0b6/144231d8/1758659309/VEsD/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information")** | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea768/e60883a/7020a0b6/144231d8/1758659309/VEsA/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information").

CHC Bold PAC is the voice for Latinos in American politics. We are committed to representing the values of the Latino community and increasing the diversity of our leadership in the House and Senate.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to elect candidates passionate about issues that impact the Latino community, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea768/e60883a/7020a0b6/144231d9/1758659309/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea768/e60883a/7020a0b6/144231d9/1758659309/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts to elect diverse Democrats, please [click here](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=").

_From the entire BOLD PAC team, thanks for your support!_

**[DONATE>>](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

clean_body: | "\[firstname\]=&signature\[lastname\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zipcode\]=18326" | ** "\[firstname\]=&signature\[lastname\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zipcode\]=18326" Friends, America has a gun problem. The facts speak for themselves: Nearly a quarter of U.S. teenagers (14-17) have witnessed a shooting. [1] An average of 7 children and teenagers are killed by guns -- every day. [2] In 2007, more pre-school aged children were killed by gun violence than police officers killed in the line of duty. [3] It's a sad fact that while guns kill almost 90 people every day in America, Congress isn't passing the critical legislation we need to curb the violence. In fact, NRA-backed politicians have made it impossible for the federal government to even study the problem of gun violence. "\[firstname\]=&signature\[lastname\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zipcode\]=18326" Make no mistake: the fact that Congress is prohibited from studying gun violence is no accident. It's a testament to the power that the NRA holds over our elected officials. It's clear that something has to be done to break the silence, and that's why this initiative is so important. It will launch a much-needed national conversation promoting awareness of this critical issue. It will also provide a platform for addressing the effects of gun violence by bringing citizens and community leaders together to make our communities safer. We must take steps immediately to combat this worsening epidemic. Sign this important petition today: "\[firstname\]=&signature\[lastname\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zipcode\]=18326" Thank you, BOLD PAC [1] U.S. Department of Justice | October 2009 | Children's Exposure to Violence: A Comprehensive National Study [2] CDC Web-based Injury Statistics Query and Reporting System | 2009-2013 [3] Children's Defense Fund | September 2010 | Protect Children Not Guns 2010 | 220 I St. NE, Suite 280 Washington, DC 20002 | PAID FOR BY BOLDPAC AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Huma Abedin, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Add your name to our card for the Clinton family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Send the Clinton Family holiday cheer | Friend --

The holidays have always been a special time for Hillary and Bill. In 1978, they took a Christmas vacation to London. While they were strolling through Chelsea, they heard the Judy Collins song “Chelsea Morning.” Bill told Hillary that if they ever had a daughter, they should name her Chelsea -- and then he started singing along.

**[Hillary and Bill won’t have time for any family vacations this holiday season, but you can make sure it’s still special and filled with joy!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**Will you sign the official campaign holiday card for Hillary and Bill? It will really make them smile to see your best wishes:** [ | | [**Sign the card**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you so much. I hope that decades from now, Hillary will tell the story of the holiday season of 2015, when this campaign family came together and stood with her to make history.

Happy holidays,

Huma

Huma Abedin
Vice Chair
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQyOTA1NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyMTM0ODkwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
